nasb.text: So we carried on the work with half of them holding spears from dawn until the stars appeared.

esv.text: So we labored at the work, and half of them held the spears from the break of dawn until the stars came out.

cnv.text: 我們就這樣作工；一半人緊握著槍，從黎明直到星宿出現的時候。

ccb.text: 这样，从黎明直到星星出现，我们的人一半工作，一半手持兵器守卫。
